clusters.successful_fix: Phase 2 build complete on TEMP DB (live db/fb-bot.db untouched, no commits). Files: migrations/v2_branches.js + migrate.js runner wiring; db.js (SCHEMA_VERSION=2, fixed ACCOUNT_UPDATE_COLUMNS, new BRANCH_UPDATE_COLUMNS, branch accessors, countBranchActionsToday); worker/loadConfig.js (hydrateBranch + loadWorkerConfig branches[]); worker/loop.js cycle-per-branch; core/{state,governor,ban-signal}.js re-keyed to branch_id; test/migration-v2.test.js. Round-trip test 4/4 PASS (lossless, idempotent, BLOCKING-1 fault-injection rollback, hydrateBranch contract). MIGRATION ORDERING GOTCHA caught by full-runner integration test (not the unit test): db.getDb() applies v2 schema head whose branch_id indexes fail on v1 tables even with IF NOT EXISTS — so migrate.js must run migrateToV2 on a RAW connection BEFORE db.getDb(). Three-tier cap: branch.dailyActionCap(NULL=inherit) -> accounts.daily_action_cap CEILING(retained) -> settings.global(0=unlimited); default-branch cap seeded NULL to avoid budget-doubling.
